title: Molten Tools -  Better than Netherite!
description:
A Mod that adds new "Molten" items, blocks and armour.

Made using MCreator.
body:
![moltentoolslogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af1d169f525506943affa674bac74d26e0f4739.png)

## Molten Tools

📌 Compatible with NeoForge 1.21.4 & Forge 1.20.1 singleplayer worlds only


---

## 🔥 What is Molten Tools?

Tired of your Netherite gear feeling... basic? Molten Tools gives you a way to forge stronger, more durable tools and armor, with a molten flair.
![Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e65f46c24112070513d49c6b08c2cadb8b0e08.png)

---

## ✨ Features

Adds Molten Tools and Molten Armor crafted from a blend of Ancient Debris, Lava Buckets, and Golden Blocks
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3be66c970dc9b11ed7f4ad222b0da84076940af.png)
Introduces a Molten Block, a unique resource crafted from lava and precious materials

All gear looks cool and provides improved durability and power



---

## 💡 Why download It?

Strengthen your endgame toolkit, get gear that’s not just flashy, but actually better

Adds a satisfying crafting progression using lava, gold, and debris.

Perfect for players who want a little extra oomph in their Nether tech
